payload.answer: Classified the chat summary into durable architecture decisions and open questions. No conflicts or superseded facts were detected.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

entity_resolution.reason: The summary contains durable architecture decisions and open questions about the Brain memory system, but no existing entity identifiers were provided.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, not the source of truth.
Slack should be used as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain system.

details: Identified Brain DB as source of truth.
Identified Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Identified Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Preserved Telegram and model choice as unresolved open questions.
